method.name: getGetterProperty
method.comment: Documentation for interface getter property.

tag.name: return
tag.text: @return value of getterProperty

tag.name: deprecated
tag.text: @deprecated replaced by something else

method.name: testSuperTypeString
method.comment: Tests that custom mapping a superclass to a primitive doesn't cause errors.

class.name: ImmutableCircle
class.comment:
Immutable implementation of ,{@link ImmutablesTest.Circle},.

Use the builder to create immutable instances: ,{@code new ImmutablesTest.Circle.Builder()},.

tag.name: return
tag.text: @return The value of the {@code radius} attribute

method.name: withRadius
method.comment: Copy the current immutable object by setting a value for the ,{@link ImmutablesTest.Circle#radius() radius}, attribute. A value strict bits equality used to prevent copying of the same value by returning ,{@code this},.

tag.name: param
tag.text: @param value A new value for radius

tag.name: return
tag.text: @return A modified copy or the {@code this} object

method.name: equals
method.comment: This instance is equal to all instances of ,{@code ImmutableCircle}, that have equal attribute values.

tag.name: return
tag.text: @return {@code true} if {@code this} is equal to {@code another} instance

method.name: hashCode
method.comment: Computes a hash code from attributes: ,{@code radius},.

tag.name: return
tag.text: @return hashCode value

method.name: toString
method.comment: Prints the immutable value ,{@code Circle}, with attribute values.

tag.name: return
tag.text: @return A string representation of the value

tag.name: param
tag.text: @param json A JSON-bindable data structure

tag.name: return
tag.text: @return An immutable value type

tag.name: deprecated
tag.text: @deprecated Do not use this method directly, it exists only for the Jackson-binding infrastructure

method.name: copyOf
method.comment: Creates an immutable copy of a ,{@link ImmutablesTest.Circle}, value. Uses accessors to get values to initialize the new immutable instance. If an instance is already immutable, it is returned as is.

tag.name: param
tag.text: @param instance The instance to copy

tag.name: return
tag.text: @return A copied immutable Circle instance

class.name: Builder
class.comment:
Builds instances of type ,{@link ImmutableCircle ImmutableCircle},. Initialize attributes and then invoke the ,{@link #build()}, method to create an immutable instance.

{@code Builder}, is not thread-safe and generally should not be stored in a field or collection, but instead used immediately to create instances.

constructor.name: Builder
constructor.comment:
Creates a builder for ,{@link ImmutableCircle ImmutableCircle}, instances. 
 new ImmutablesTest.Circle.Builder()
    .radius(double) // required ,{@link ImmutablesTest.Circle#radius() radius},
    .build();

method.name: from
method.comment: Fill a builder with attribute values from the provided ,{@code Circle}, instance. Regular attribute values will be replaced with those from the given instance. Absent optional values will not replace present values.

tag.name: param
tag.text: @param instance The instance from which to copy values

tag.name: return
tag.text: @return {@code this} builder for use in a chained invocation

method.name: radius
method.comment: Initializes the value for the ,{@link ImmutablesTest.Circle#radius() radius}, attribute.

tag.name: param
tag.text: @param radius The value for radius

tag.name: return
tag.text: @return {@code this} builder for use in a chained invocation

method.name: build
method.comment: Builds a new ,{@link ImmutableCircle ImmutableCircle},.

tag.name: return
tag.text: @return An immutable instance of Circle

tag.name: throws
tag.text: @throws java.lang.IllegalStateException if any required attributes are missing

class.name: ImmutableRectangle
class.comment:
Immutable implementation of ,{@link ImmutablesTest.Rectangle},.

Use the builder to create immutable instances: ,{@code new ImmutablesTest.Rectangle.Builder()},.

tag.name: return
tag.text: @return The value of the {@code width} attribute

tag.name: return
tag.text: @return The value of the {@code height} attribute

method.name: withWidth
method.comment: Copy the current immutable object by setting a value for the ,{@link ImmutablesTest.Rectangle#width() width}, attribute. A value strict bits equality used to prevent copying of the same value by returning ,{@code this},.

tag.name: param
tag.text: @param value A new value for width

tag.name: return
tag.text: @return A modified copy or the {@code this} object

method.name: withHeight
method.comment: Copy the current immutable object by setting a value for the ,{@link ImmutablesTest.Rectangle#height() height}, attribute. A value strict bits equality used to prevent copying of the same value by returning ,{@code this},.

tag.name: param
tag.text: @param value A new value for height

tag.name: return
tag.text: @return A modified copy or the {@code this} object

method.name: equals
method.comment: This instance is equal to all instances of ,{@code ImmutableRectangle}, that have equal attribute values.

tag.name: return
tag.text: @return {@code true} if {@code this} is equal to {@code another} instance

method.name: hashCode
method.comment: Computes a hash code from attributes: ,{@code width},, ,{@code height},.

tag.name: return
tag.text: @return hashCode value

method.name: toString
method.comment: Prints the immutable value ,{@code Rectangle}, with attribute values.

tag.name: return
tag.text: @return A string representation of the value

tag.name: param
tag.text: @param json A JSON-bindable data structure

tag.name: return
tag.text: @return An immutable value type

tag.name: deprecated
tag.text: @deprecated Do not use this method directly, it exists only for the Jackson-binding infrastructure

method.name: copyOf
method.comment: Creates an immutable copy of a ,{@link ImmutablesTest.Rectangle}, value. Uses accessors to get values to initialize the new immutable instance. If an instance is already immutable, it is returned as is.

tag.name: param
tag.text: @param instance The instance to copy

tag.name: return
tag.text: @return A copied immutable Rectangle instance

class.name: Builder
class.comment:
Builds instances of type ,{@link ImmutableRectangle ImmutableRectangle},. Initialize attributes and then invoke the ,{@link #build()}, method to create an immutable instance.

{@code Builder}, is not thread-safe and generally should not be stored in a field or collection, but instead used immediately to create instances.

constructor.name: Builder
constructor.comment:
Creates a builder for ,{@link ImmutableRectangle ImmutableRectangle}, instances. 
 new ImmutablesTest.Rectangle.Builder()
    .width(double) // required ,{@link ImmutablesTest.Rectangle#width() width},
    .height(double) // required ,{@link ImmutablesTest.Rectangle#height() height},
    .build();

method.name: from
method.comment: Fill a builder with attribute values from the provided ,{@code Rectangle}, instance. Regular attribute values will be replaced with those from the given instance. Absent optional values will not replace present values.

tag.name: param
tag.text: @param instance The instance from which to copy values

tag.name: return
tag.text: @return {@code this} builder for use in a chained invocation

method.name: width
method.comment: Initializes the value for the ,{@link ImmutablesTest.Rectangle#width() width}, attribute.

tag.name: param
tag.text: @param width The value for width

tag.name: return
tag.text: @return {@code this} builder for use in a chained invocation

method.name: height
method.comment: Initializes the value for the ,{@link ImmutablesTest.Rectangle#height() height}, attribute.

tag.name: param
tag.text: @param height The value for height

tag.name: return
tag.text: @return {@code this} builder for use in a chained invocation

method.name: build
method.comment: Builds a new ,{@link ImmutableRectangle ImmutableRectangle},.

tag.name: return
tag.text: @return An immutable instance of Rectangle

tag.name: throws
tag.text: @throws java.lang.IllegalStateException if any required attributes are missing

class.name: Jackson2DeserializableRootType
class.comment: Test that root type name in a hirarchy is included iff root type itself is not abstract

class.name: Jackson3DeserializableRootType
class.comment: Test that root type name in a hirarchy is included iff root type itself is not abstract

for this class.

ClassWithJavadoc

method.name: getPerson
method.comment: Returns person with specified ID.
